name: ai
description: Backend-first AI substrate per blueprint §10.21 (D6 locked). Wraps `laravel/ai` (first-party). Ships FOUR owned entities: `AiConversation` (persona-scoped chat — user_id + persona + title + status; message history tenant-scoped), `AiRun` (single model invocation — model / tokens_in / tokens_out / latency_ms / cost_minor; audit trail per conversation), `AiToolCall` (individual tool invocation inside an AiRun — tool_name + args_hash + result_summary + ms + error?), `AiEmbedding` (vector embedding for RAG search — source_type + source_id + vector; tenant-namespaced). Three layers: (1) AI module owns tools/agents/provider calls, (2) domain modules contribute tools via `#[AsAiTool]`, (3) personas bundle tool set + system prompt + guardrails. Nine built-in personas including CoachAssistant / ParentAssistant / AdminAssistant / MedicalAssistant. All prompts + responses + tool calls audited. Per-tenant AI-token pool via entitlements. Medical/safeguarding data NEVER sent without explicit consent. Write-back tools default to draft-then-confirm. Frontend uses Vercel AI SDK useChat streaming — browser NEVER holds provider keys.

attribute_driven.description: Domain modules contribute tools + personas via attributes discovered at boot.

attributes.AsAiTool: Marks a class as an AI tool. `#[AsAiTool(name: 'find_athlete', sensitivity: 'pii', personas: ['CoachAssistant', 'AdminAssistant'])]`.
attributes.AsAiPersona: Marks a class as an AI persona. `#[AsAiPersona(name: 'CoachAssistant', model: 'gpt-4', tools: [...])]`.

tenant.description: Backend-first streaming — POST /api/ai/chat/{persona} with Vercel AI SDK data-stream protocol.
